hero_desc: Raxa uses explainable AI and basic health markers to assess Diabetes and Hypertension risk 6–12 months in advance. Designed for ASHA workers & community health.
no_signup: No signup required • 100% Private • Instant results
feature_1_desc: We don't just give a score. Raxa explains why a patient is at risk using clinical feature analysis that health workers can trust.
feature_2_desc: Screen for Type-2 Diabetes and Hypertension simultaneously using a single set of vitals. Saves time and resources.
feature_3_desc: Zero data storage. All predictions are generated in real-time and discarded after use. 100% stateless and secure.
footer_cta_desc: Join community health workers using Raxa to detect chronic disease risk before it's too late.
disclaimer: ⚠️ Raxa provides early risk screening and prevention guidance only. It is not a medical diagnosis and does not replace professional medical advice. Consult a doctor for clinical diagnosis.
download_help: Save a copy to share with your doctor.
rescreen_3_months: Re-screen in 3 months and consult a doctor.
assessment_note: Note: This screening tool uses AI to estimate risk. It does not replace a doctor's diagnosis.
download_desc: Get a printable PDF summary for follow-up or sharing with your healthcare provider.
footer_disclaimer_text: Raxa provides early risk screening and prevention guidance only. It is not a medical diagnosis and does not replace professional medical advice. Consult a doctor for clinical diagnosis.
chat_intro: Hello! I am Raxa's AI assistant. I can answer questions about Diabetes and Hypertension based on confirmed medical data. How can I help?
chat_disclaimer: AI answers are for information only. Consult a doctor for diagnosis.
adaptive_subtitle: Adaptive questioning for accurate disease prediction
essential_info: Only essential questions asked. This screening is for informational purposes only.
q_temperature: What is your current body temperature (°F)?
q_chills: Do you have chills or shivering?
q_concern: What is your primary health concern today?
msg_analyze_desc: I've analyzed your description and prepared some additional follow-up questions to understand your situation better.
